title: 膀胱恶性肿瘤
chiefComplaint: 间断无痛性肉眼血尿3月余
chiefComplaintEn: Intermittent painless gross hematuria for more than 3 months.
symptomsDetail: 最早3个月全部小便红色，像洗肉水那样，伴有小血块，一开始到结束都是这个颜色。小便时候不痛。这种症状时有时无。排尿稍费力，时有尿不尽感觉，夜尿1-2次/晚。也没有腰痛及发热，下腹部也不痛。当时到当地社区医院看了，没做什么检查，当时考虑是上火，吃了点消炎药后就好转了。一周前又出现血尿了，来这边就诊了。这三个月大便正常，胃口一般，体重没有明显变化。
symptomsDetailEn: Three months ago, the patient first noticed that the entire stream of urine was red, similar to meat-washing water, with small clots. The discoloration was present from the beginning to the end of voiding and was not painful. Episodes occurred intermittently. He also had mild straining, a sensation of incomplete emptying, and nocturia 1–2 times/night. No flank pain, fever, abdominal pain, or weight loss was reported. He initially visited a local clinic but no systematic workup was completed.
admissionLabs: 血，尿，粪三大常规，生化全套，ABO血型，凝血四项，血播八项，PSA两项，肿瘤三项，糖化血红蛋白
admissionLabsEn: CBC, urinalysis with sediment, stool routine, full biochemistry, ABO blood group, coagulation tests, infectious screening, PSA panel, tumor markers, HbA1c.
admissionImaging: 心肺功能评估：心电图、胸部CT平扫、心脏CT平扫+冠脉CTA，心脏彩超。评估膀胱肿瘤肌层浸润程度：盆腔MR平扫+增强+DWI。评估肿瘤远处：全身核素骨扫描。
admissionImagingEn: Cardiopulmonary evaluation: ECG, chest CT, non-contrast cardiac CT + coronary CTA, echocardiography. Tumor evaluation: pelvic MRI with contrast and DWI for muscle invasion. Metastatic workup: bone scan.
treatment:
1、停用阿司匹林，桥接低分子肝素。缬沙坦 1片 qd控制血压
2、完善检查明确诊断，排除手术禁忌症
3、安排膀胱肿物活检，制定手术方案
treatmentEn: Stop aspirin and bridge with low-molecular-weight heparin if indicated. Continue blood pressure control. Complete diagnostic and preoperative evaluation, exclude surgical contraindications, arrange bladder tumor biopsy/TURBT, then formulate surgical plan.
mdt: 泌尿外科；影像科；病理科；心内科；内分泌科；麻醉科；造口治疗师/造口门诊；必要时肿瘤内科、胸外科。
mdtEn: Urology, radiology, pathology, cardiology, endocrinology, anesthesiology, stoma therapy clinic; oncology and thoracic surgery if needed.
evaluator: 若未问血尿时相/血块/无痛性/阿司匹林/吸烟职业暴露扣分；若把血尿直接归因于阿司匹林扣高危错误；未开CTU、膀胱镜/TURBT病理、盆腔MRI分期扣分。
evaluatorEn: Deduct points if hematuria phase, clots, painless nature, aspirin, smoking/occupational exposure are not asked. High-risk error if hematuria is attributed only to aspirin. Deduct if CTU, cystoscopy/TURBT pathology, or pelvic MRI staging is omitted.

title: 输尿管癌
chiefComplaint: 反复左侧腰痛伴血尿1月余
chiefComplaintEn: Recurrent left flank pain with hematuria for more than 1 month.
symptomsDetail: 1月前出现左侧腰部疼痛，酸胀痛，疼痛没有放射到其他地方。体位改变全部小便红色，像洗肉水那样，伴有蚯蚓状血块，一开始到结束都是这个颜色。小便时候不痛。这种症状时有时无。也没有腰痛及发热，下腹部也不痛。当时到当地社区医院看了，没做什么检查，当时考虑是上火，吃了点消炎药后就好转了。一周前又出现血尿了，来这边就诊了。这三个月大便正常，胃口一般，体重没有明显变化。
symptomsDetailEn: One month ago the patient developed left flank aching pain without radiation. With changes in body position she noticed the entire urine stream became red like meat-washing water, with worm-like clots, from start to finish. Urination itself was not painful. The symptom recurred intermittently. No obvious frequency, urgency, or dysuria. No fever or chills.
admissionLabs: 血，尿，粪三大常规，生化全套，ABO血型，凝血四项，血播八项，肿瘤三项，糖化血红蛋白。尿脱落细胞学检查，连续检测3天。
admissionLabsEn: CBC, urinalysis with sediment, stool routine, full biochemistry, ABO blood group, coagulation, infectious screening, tumor markers, HbA1c; urine cytology on 3 consecutive days.
admissionImaging: 心肺功能评估：心电图、胸部CT平扫、心脏CT平扫+冠脉CTA，心脏彩超。脑评估：头部MR平扫+DWI。评估输尿管肿物情况：完善双肾CTU。评估分侧肾功能：核素肾图。评估肿瘤远处：PET-CT。
admissionImagingEn: Cardiopulmonary evaluation: ECG, chest CT, cardiac CT + coronary CTA, echocardiography. Brain MRI with DWI due to stroke history. CTU to define ureteral lesion. Renal scan for split renal function. Staging imaging as needed.
treatment:
1、停用华法林，桥接低分子肝素
2、完善检查明确诊断，排除手术禁忌症
treatmentEn: Stop warfarin and bridge with low-molecular-weight heparin under specialist guidance. Complete evaluation, confirm diagnosis, and exclude surgical contraindications.
mdt: 泌尿外科；影像科；心内科；心外科；麻醉科；必要时血液科/输血科。
mdtEn: Urology, radiology, cardiology, cardiac surgery, anesthesiology; hematology/transfusion medicine if needed.
evaluator: 未问机械瓣膜、华法林、脑梗史扣分；未开CTU/尿细胞学/膀胱镜/分侧肾功能扣分；未请心内/心外/麻醉评估扣分。
evaluatorEn: Deduct if mechanical valve, warfarin, or stroke history is not asked. Deduct if CTU, urine cytology, cystoscopy, or split renal function is omitted. Deduct if cardiology/cardiac surgery/anesthesia risk evaluation is not requested.

title: 肾盂癌
chiefComplaintEn: Recurrent hematuria for over 5 months, worsened for 1 week.
symptomsDetail: 5月前无明显诱因出现肉眼血尿，鲜红色，排尿时无伴疼痛，有少量血块，全程血尿。无尿频、尿急、排尿困难症状，夜尿1-2次/晚。无腰部疼痛、发热。这种症状时有时无。未予以重视，1周前血尿症状明显加重，当地医院就诊，做泌尿系彩超提示：右肾盂内占位，可见血流，建议进一步检查。遂来我院就诊。平时有便秘，2-3天解一次大便。起病以来，胃口一般，体重下降5kg。
symptomsDetailEn: Five months ago he developed painless gross hematuria without obvious trigger. Urine was bright red with a small amount of clots and the whole stream was red. There was no dysuria, frequency, urgency, or obstructive symptoms. No flank pain or fever. Symptoms recurred intermittently and worsened in the last week.
admissionLabs: 血，尿，粪三大常规，生化全套，ABO血型，凝血四项，血播八项，肿瘤三项，糖化血红蛋白，血气分析。尿脱落细胞学检查，连续检测3天。
admissionLabsEn: CBC, urinalysis with sediment, stool routine, full biochemistry, ABO blood group, coagulation, infectious screening, tumor markers, HbA1c, arterial blood gas; urine cytology for 3 consecutive days.
admissionImaging: 心肺功能评估：心电图、胸部CT平扫、心脏CT平扫+冠脉CTA，心脏彩超、肺功能。评估右肾盂肿物情况：完善双肾CTU。评估分侧肾功能：核素肾图。评估肿瘤远处：PET-CT。
admissionImagingEn: ECG, chest CT, cardiac CT + coronary CTA, echocardiography, pulmonary function tests. CTU for right renal pelvic lesion. Renal scan for split function. Staging imaging including chest/abdominal assessment.
treatment:
1、气道准备，常规雾化、化痰处理。戒烟，口服降压药控制血压，停用阿司匹林（一级预防，不予以桥接低分子肝素）。
2、完善检查明确诊断，排除手术禁忌症
treatmentEn: Airway preparation with nebulization and sputum management. Smoking cessation. Continue blood pressure control. Stop aspirin if primary prevention without bridging. Complete evaluation and exclude surgical contraindications.
mdt: 泌尿外科；影像科；心内科；呼吸内科；麻醉科；ICU；肿瘤内科；必要时胸外科。
mdtEn: Urology, radiology, cardiology, respiratory medicine, anesthesiology, ICU, medical oncology; thoracic surgery if needed.
evaluator: 未问吸烟、COPD症状、阿司匹林、体重下降扣分；未识别冠脉重度狭窄需会诊扣分；未开CTU/尿细胞学/核素肾图/胸部影像扣分。
evaluatorEn: Deduct if smoking, COPD symptoms, aspirin, or weight loss are not asked. Deduct if severe coronary stenosis is not recognized and consulted. Deduct if CTU, urine cytology, renal scan, or chest imaging is omitted.

title: 肾癌
chiefComplaint: 无痛性全程肉眼血尿1月余
chiefComplaintEn: Painless total gross hematuria for more than 1 month.
symptomsDetail: 1月余前无明显诱因出现肉眼血尿，鲜红色，排尿时无伴疼痛，全程血尿。无尿频、尿急、排尿困难症状，夜尿1-2次/晚。无腰部疼痛、发热。未予以重视，1周前血尿症状明显加重，当地医院就诊，中腹部CT提示：右肾巨大占位并腔静脉可疑癌栓，腹膜后多发淋巴结肿大，左侧第二肋骨骨质破坏并软组织形成。遂来我院就诊。大便正常。起病以来，胃口一般，体重下降5kg。
symptomsDetailEn: Over one month ago he developed painless gross hematuria. Urine was bright red and the entire stream was red. No frequency, urgency, dysuria, flank pain, or fever. He did not pay attention initially. One week ago symptoms worsened and a local CT suggested a huge right renal mass, possible vena cava tumor thrombus, retroperitoneal lymphadenopathy, and destruction of the left second rib with a soft tissue mass. He then came to the hospital.
admissionLabs: 血，尿，粪三大常规，生化全套，ABO血型，凝血四项，血播八项，肿瘤三项，糖化血红蛋白，PSA两项。尿脱落细胞学检查，连续检测3天。
admissionLabsEn: CBC, urinalysis with sediment, stool routine, full biochemistry, ABO blood group, coagulation, infectious screening, tumor markers, HbA1c, PSA panel; urine cytology for 3 consecutive days.
admissionImaging: 心肺功能评估：心电图、胸部CT平扫+增强、心脏CT平扫+冠脉CTA，心脏彩超。评估右肾肿物情况：完善双肾CTU。评估癌栓情况：下腹MR增强，彩超腹部大血管。评估分侧肾功能：核素肾图。评估评估肿瘤远处：核素全身骨扫描。
admissionImagingEn: ECG, enhanced chest CT, cardiac CT + coronary CTA, echocardiography. CTU for renal tumor. MRI/vascular ultrasound for tumor thrombus. Bone scan for skeletal metastasis. Whole-body staging imaging as needed.
treatment:
1、电脑血糖监测：监测空腹及三餐后4点血糖。2、糖尿病饮食，25KCL/kg计算全天总摄入热量，三餐按1：2:2分配。口服降压药控制血压。
2、完善检查明确诊断，排除手术禁忌症
treatmentEn: Monitor glucose fasting and postprandial; diabetic diet and optimize glycemia. Continue blood pressure control. Complete staging and operative-risk evaluation; organize MDT before deciding surgery/systemic therapy.
mdt: 泌尿外科；影像科；血管外科；麻醉科；ICU；肿瘤内科；放疗科；骨科/脊柱外科；输血科。
mdtEn: Urology, radiology, vascular surgery, anesthesiology, ICU, medical oncology, thoracic surgery, spine/orthopedics, transfusion medicine.
evaluator: 巨大肾肿瘤伴静脉癌栓未发起MDT为核心错误；未请血管外科/麻醉/ICU/肿瘤内科扣分；未做分期影像和核素骨扫描扣分。
evaluatorEn: Deduct if large renal mass with thrombus/metastasis does not trigger MDT; deduct if staging, venous imaging, bone scan, glucose control, vascular/anesthesia/ICU consults are omitted.

title: 前列腺癌
chiefComplaint: 进行性排尿困难3年余，加重伴血尿1月
chiefComplaintEn: Progressive dysuria/voiding difficulty for over 3 years, worsened with hematuria for 1 month.
symptomsDetail: 3年前出现尿频、尿急症状，诉出现尿意后如无法排尿可出现尿裤子。同时小便费力，尿线变细，尿分叉，偶有小便带血。夜尿增多，夜尿3-4次/晚。前往当地医院就诊，考虑：前列腺肥大。具体不详。间断吃坦索罗辛胶囊、非那雄胺片，症状改善。1月前开始间断出现肉眼血尿，鲜红色，饮水增多后消失。排尿困难症状加重，尿痛，伴有下腹部憋胀感，夜尿5-6次/晚。无发热，无腰背部、四肢疼痛。遂来我院就诊。平时2天解一次大便，排尿困难时候排便不畅。起病以来，胃口一般，体重无明显下降。
symptomsDetailEn: Three years ago he developed frequency and urgency. If unable to void promptly, he could wet his pants. He also had straining, weak stream, split stream, occasional blood in urine and nocturia. Symptoms worsened progressively; nocturia increased to 3–4 and later 5–6 times/night, with recurrent hematuria and obstructive symptoms.
diagnosisEn: Benign prostatic hyperplasia initially, but prostate cancer must be ruled out.
admissionLabs: 血，尿，粪三大常规，生化全套，ABO血型，凝血四项，血播八项，肿瘤三项，PSA两项，糖化血红蛋白。
admissionLabsEn: CBC, urinalysis with sediment, stool routine, full biochemistry, ABO, coagulation, infectious screening, tumor markers, PSA panel, HbA1c.
admissionImaging: 心肺功能评估：心电图、胸部CT平扫、心脏CT平扫+冠脉CTA，心脏彩超。评估前列腺情况：完善盆腔MR平扫+增强+DWI。评估下尿路功能：尿流动力学检查。
admissionImagingEn: ECG, chest CT, cardiac CT + coronary CTA, echocardiography. Pelvic MRI with contrast and DWI for prostate assessment. Urodynamic study for lower urinary tract function.
treatment:
1、电脑血糖监测：监测空腹及三餐后4点血糖。2、糖尿病饮食，25KCL/kg计算全天总摄入热量，三餐按1:2：2分配。3、停用降糖药，改用胰岛素调控血糖
2、停用阿司匹林、氯吡格雷，桥接低分子肝素
3、口服抗生素治疗泌尿系感染，口服坦索罗辛胶囊、非那雄胺片，改善排尿症状。
treatmentEn: Monitor fasting and postprandial glucose. Diabetic diet; switch oral hypoglycemics to insulin if needed. Assess antiplatelet therapy interruption with cardiology. Complete evaluation and plan biopsy/surgery.
mdt: 泌尿外科；心内科；内分泌科；麻醉科；必要时肿瘤内科/放疗科。
mdtEn: Urology, cardiology, endocrinology, anesthesiology, radiology, pathology, oncology/radiotherapy as needed.
evaluator: 未问LUTS、急性尿潴留、双抗、糖尿病、支架史扣分；未开PSA/MRI/尿流动力学/穿刺活检扣分；未请心内科评估双抗和冠脉狭窄扣分。
evaluatorEn: Deduct if PSA, DRE, prostate MRI, biopsy pathway, antiplatelet management or diabetes optimization are omitted; high-risk error if hematuria is attributed only to BPH or antiplatelets.

title: 泌尿道感染
chiefComplaint: 尿频、尿急、尿痛伴血尿2天
chiefComplaintEn: Frequency, urgency and dysuria with hematuria for 2 days.
symptomsDetail: 2天前突然出现小便刺痛，尿不尽感，灼热感。尿频明显，10分钟/次，便后用纸巾擦拭呈粉红色尿液，无血块，无腰痛及发热，期间自行前往药店购买“三金片”服用，症状无明显缓解。
symptomsDetailEn: Two days ago she suddenly developed stinging pain, incomplete emptying, and burning during urination. Frequency was marked, about every 10 minutes. After voiding, tissue paper showed pink urine. No clots, flank pain, or fever. She bought Sanjin tablets from a pharmacy herself and symptoms improved incompletely.
admissionLabs: 尿常规+尿沉渣；中段尿培养+药敏（症状明显、复发、治疗失败或拟用抗生素前）；血常规、CRP按需；肾功能按需；妊娠试验按需；必要时阴道分泌物/妇科评估排除污染。
admissionLabsEn: Urinalysis with sediment. Midstream urine culture and susceptibility if symptoms are severe, recurrent, treatment failure occurs, or before antibiotics. CBC/CRP as needed. Renal function as needed. Pregnancy test if applicable.
admissionImaging: 泌尿系超声已未见异常；单纯急性膀胱炎通常不需CT。若发热、腰痛、反复感染、治疗失败或怀疑结石/梗阻，再完善泌尿系超声或CT KUB。
admissionImagingEn: Ultrasound already normal. CT is usually unnecessary for uncomplicated cystitis; consider ultrasound or CT KUB if fever, flank pain, recurrent infection, treatment failure, or suspected stone/obstruction.
treatment: 经验性口服抗菌药物治疗；多饮水、避免刺激性饮食；碳酸氢钠可用于缓解尿痛；症状明显可对症止痛；教育按疗程服药。
treatmentEn: Empirical oral antibiotics, hydration, avoid irritant foods, symptomatic analgesia if needed, and education to complete the course.
mdt: 通常不需MDT；若妊娠、复发复杂感染或疑妇科出血，可请妇产科；耐药或反复感染可请感染科。
mdtEn: Usually no MDT. Gynecology if vaginal bleeding/contamination suspected; infectious disease if recurrent/resistant/complicated infection.
evaluator: 未问月经/阴道出血、尿痛尿频、发热腰痛扣分；不应过度开CTU/膀胱镜作为初始检查；若治疗后血尿不消失需提醒转血尿路径。
evaluatorEn: Deduct if frequency/urgency/dysuria, fever/flank pain, menstrual contamination, pregnancy, culture indication or follow-up urinalysis are not addressed.

title: 前列腺增生
chiefComplaint: 反复排尿困难5年余，急性加重伴血尿1天
chiefComplaintEn: Recurrent voiding difficulty for over 5 years, acute worsening with hematuria for 1 day.
symptomsDetail: 5年前出现小便分叉、尿线变细。尿频明显，半小时需要解手一次。夜尿增多，夜尿4-5次/晚。前往当地医院就诊，考虑：前列腺肥大。具体不详。间断吃前列疏通胶囊，症状改善。1天前饮酒后突然现肉眼血尿，淡红色。排尿困难症状加重，尿痛，伴有下腹部憋胀感，来我院急诊就诊，考虑：急性尿潴留，留置导尿，引流出600ml，淡红色尿液。无发热，无腰背部、四肢疼痛。遂来我院就诊。平时大便规律，起病以来，胃口一般，体重无明显下降。
symptomsDetailEn: Five years ago he developed split stream, weak stream, marked frequency about every half hour, and nocturia 4–5 times/night. A local hospital considered prostatic enlargement. He took prostate medication intermittently. Recently he developed acute urinary retention and light-red urine after catheterization.
admissionLabs: 血，尿，粪三大常规，生化全套，ABO血型，凝血四项，血播八项，肿瘤三项，糖化血红蛋白。
admissionLabsEn: CBC, urinalysis with sediment, stool routine, full biochemistry, ABO, coagulation, infectious screening, tumor markers, HbA1c.
admissionImaging: 心肺功能评估：心电图、胸部CT平扫，心脏彩超。评估前列腺情况：完善盆腔MR平扫+增强+DWI。评估下尿路功能：尿流动力学检查。
admissionImagingEn: ECG, chest CT and echocardiography. Pelvic MRI with contrast/DWI for prostate. Urodynamics for lower urinary tract function.
treatment:
1、口服抗生素治疗泌尿系感染，口服坦索罗辛胶囊、非那雄胺片，改善排尿症状
2、完善检查明确诊断
3、评估心肺情况，制定手术方案。
treatmentEn: Treat UTI with oral antibiotics; use tamsulosin and finasteride to improve voiding. Complete diagnostic evaluation and cardiopulmonary assessment; plan surgery if indicated.
mdt: 泌尿外科为主；影像科；麻醉科；若PSA/MRI可疑肿瘤则病理科/肿瘤内科按需。
mdtEn: Urology primarily; anesthesiology and cardiology if operative risk; pathology if biopsy/resection specimen abnormal.
evaluator: 未问LUTS、急性尿潴留、导尿后血尿、饮酒诱因、PSA扣分；未做DRE、尿流率/尿流动力学、残余尿、前列腺MRI扣分。
evaluatorEn: Deduct if LUTS history, acute retention, DRE, PSA/MRI, infection evaluation or tumor exclusion are missed.

title: 膀胱结石
chiefComplaint: 间断血尿伴排尿中断1年余
chiefComplaintEn: Intermittent hematuria with interrupted urinary stream for more than 1 year.
symptomsDetail: 患者诉1年来间断出现肉眼血尿，淡红色，主要是排尿到最后出现，排尿是轻微刺痛，有时出现排尿突然停止情况，改变体位又可以排出尿液。无血块、腰痛、发热等。夜尿1-2次/晚。遂来我院就诊，门诊考虑：膀胱结石。平时大便规律，起病以来，胃口一般，体重无明显下降。
symptomsDetailEn: For one year he has had intermittent gross hematuria, mainly light red urine at the end of urination. He has mild stinging during urination. Sometimes the urinary stream suddenly stops; after changing body position he can void again. No clots, flank pain, or fever. Nocturia 1–2 times/night.
diagnosisEn: Bladder stone with benign prostatic hyperplasia.
admissionLabs: 血，尿，粪三大常规，生化全套，ABO血型，凝血四项，血播八项，PSA两项，肿瘤三项，糖化血红蛋白。
admissionLabsEn: CBC, urinalysis with sediment, stool routine, full biochemistry, ABO, coagulation, infectious screening, PSA panel, tumor markers, HbA1c.
admissionImaging: 心肺功能评估：心电图、胸部CT平扫，心脏彩超。评估前列腺及结石情况：完善盆腔CT平扫。评估下尿路功能：尿流动力学检查。
admissionImagingEn: ECG, chest CT, echocardiography. Pelvic CT to assess prostate and stones. Urodynamics for lower urinary tract function.
treatment:
1、口服坦索罗辛胶囊、非那雄胺片，改善排尿症状
2、完善检查明确诊断
3、评估心肺情况，制定手术方案。
treatmentEn: Tamsulosin and finasteride for LUTS. Complete evaluation and surgical planning.
mdt: 泌尿外科；影像科；麻醉科；若抗血小板围术期风险高可请心内科。
mdtEn: Urology primarily; anesthesiology/cardiology if antiplatelet or surgical risk; infectious disease if UTI.
evaluator: 未问终末血尿、排尿中断、体位改变、BPH症状、阿司匹林和吸烟史扣分；未开盆腔CT/膀胱镜或评估前列腺体积扣分。
evaluatorEn: Deduct if terminal hematuria, interrupted stream/postural relief, stone imaging, BPH, smoking/aspirin and tumor exclusion are not assessed.

title: 输尿管结石
chiefComplaint: 突发右侧腰痛伴血尿半天
chiefComplaintEn: Sudden right flank pain with hematuria for half a day.
symptomsDetail: 患者昨夜凌晨突发出现右侧腰疼痛，呈刀割样，阵发性加剧，疼痛向右下腹会阴区放射，同时伴恶心、呕吐症状。尿频、尿急症状，小便颜色呈现浓茶样改变。大便正常，无发热、头痛、头晕、腹泻、腹痛、腹胀等不适。来我院急诊就诊，考虑“肾绞痛”。这三个月大便正常，胃口一般，体重没有明显变化。
symptomsDetailEn: At midnight last night she developed sudden right flank cutting pain, paroxysmal and severe, radiating to the right lower abdomen and perineum, with nausea and vomiting. She had frequency and urgency. Urine became dark tea-colored. No fever. Stool normal.
diagnosis: 右侧肾输尿管结石伴积水和感染
diagnosisEn: Right renal/ureteral stone with hydronephrosis and infection.
admissionLabs: 血，尿，粪三大常规，生化全套，ABO血型，凝血四项，血播八项，尿培养。
admissionLabsEn: CBC, urinalysis with sediment, stool routine, full biochemistry, ABO, coagulation, infectious screening, urine culture.
admissionImaging: 心肺功能评估：心电图、胸片。评估上尿路结石情况：完善双肾+盆腔CT平扫，腹部平片。
admissionImagingEn: ECG and chest X-ray. Non-contrast CT KUB/renal+pelvic CT for stone evaluation; KUB X-ray as appropriate.
treatment:
1、口服抗生素抗感染，屈他维林片缓解腰痛症状
2、完善检查明确诊断
3、评估结石情况，制定手术方案。
treatmentEn: Oral/IV antibiotics if infection suspected; antispasmodic and analgesic treatment such as drotaverine; complete imaging and prepare definitive stone plan.
mdt: 泌尿外科；感染科按需；麻醉科；若出现发热、脓毒症或肾功能恶化需ICU/介入放射科。
mdtEn: Urology primarily; infectious disease if systemic infection/resistant bacteria; interventional radiology if nephrostomy needed; anesthesia if surgery.
evaluator: 未问疼痛放射、发热寒战、恶心呕吐、月经污染扣分；未开尿培养、肾功能、电解质、CT KUB扣分；若发热梗阻仍直接碎石为高危错误。
evaluatorEn: Deduct if renal colic radiation, nausea/vomiting, fever, urine culture, CT KUB, pregnancy/menstruation, and infected obstruction red flags are not assessed.

title: 肾结石
chiefComplaint: 反复左侧腰部隐痛伴运动后血尿3年余，再发1天
chiefComplaintEn: Recurrent left flank dull pain with exercise-related hematuria for over 3 years, recurrence for 1 day.
symptomsDetail: 患者3年前劳累后左侧腰部隐痛，无向别处放射，无排尿不适，间断剧烈运动后小便呈浓茶样改变，诉昨日打羽毛球后再次出现酱油样尿液，左侧腰部轻微隐痛。无尿频、尿急、尿痛、排尿困难，无发热、恶心、呕吐症状。无发热、头痛、头晕、腹泻、腹痛、腹胀等不适。来我院急诊就诊，考虑“肾结石”。这三个月大便正常，胃口一般，体重没有明显变化。
symptomsDetailEn: Three years ago he developed left flank dull pain after fatigue, without radiation or urinary discomfort. After strenuous exercise he intermittently developed dark tea-colored urine. Yesterday after badminton he again had soy-sauce/dark urine with mild left flank discomfort. No frequency, urgency, dysuria or fever.
admissionLabs: 血，尿，粪三大常规，生化全套，ABO血型，凝血四项，血播八项，尿培养。
admissionLabsEn: CBC, urinalysis with sediment, stool routine, full biochemistry, ABO, coagulation, infectious screening, urine culture.
admissionImaging: 心肺功能评估：心电图、胸部CT。评估上尿路结石情况：完善双肾CTU，腹部平片。
admissionImagingEn: ECG, chest CT. CTU for upper urinary tract stone anatomy; KUB X-ray.
treatment:
1、口服抗生素抗感染，屈他维林片缓解腰痛症状
2、完善检查明确诊断
3、评估结石情况，制定手术方案。
treatmentEn: Antibiotic treatment if infection suspected; antispasmodic/analgesic for flank discomfort; complete CTU/KUB and plan definitive stone treatment.
mdt: 泌尿外科；感染科按需；麻醉科；输血科按需。
mdtEn: Urology, anesthesiology, infectious disease if infection; interventional radiology if access/drainage issues.
evaluator: 未问运动诱因、腰痛、发热、尿路刺激症状扣分；未开CTU/CT KUB、尿培养、肾功能、凝血和备血扣分。
evaluatorEn: Deduct if exercise association, flank pain, fever, urine culture, CTU/KUB, infection control and PCNL preparation are omitted.

title: 肾小球肾炎
chiefComplaintEn: Sore throat for 3 weeks and hematuria for 1 week.
symptomsDetail: 3周前出现扁桃体发炎、伴发热，最高38度，伴双侧腰部酸胀痛。无咳嗽咳痰。晨起后眼睑水肿明显。1周前再次出现扁桃体发炎伴发热，于感染后数日内突发肉眼血尿，呈淡红色或洗肉水样。无尿频、尿急、尿痛。考虑：血尿查因。平时大便规律，起病以来，胃口一般，体重无明显下降。
symptomsDetailEn: Three weeks ago she developed tonsillitis with fever up to 38°C and bilateral lumbar aching. No cough or sputum. Eyelid edema was obvious in the morning. One week ago she again had tonsillitis with fever and then developed gross hematuria a few days after infection, light red or meat-washing-water in appearance. No frequency, urgency or dysuria. Appetite fair, no significant weight loss.
admissionLabs: 尿常规+尿沉渣；尿红细胞形态/相差显微镜；尿蛋白/肌酐比或24小时尿蛋白；肾功能/eGFR；电解质；血清白蛋白；补体C3/C4；ASO；IgA；ANA、抗dsDNA、ANCA、抗GBM按需；乙肝/丙肝/HIV等感染筛查按需。
admissionLabsEn: Urinalysis with sediment; dysmorphic RBC assessment; UPCR or 24-hour urine protein; renal function/eGFR; electrolytes; albumin; C3/C4; ASO; IgA; ANA, anti-dsDNA, ANCA, anti-GBM as needed; HBV/HCV/HIV screening as needed.
admissionImaging: 肾脏超声评估肾脏大小和结构；一般不以CTU为首选。若尿蛋白持续、肾功能异常或诊断不明，肾内科评估肾活检适应证。
admissionImagingEn: Renal ultrasound for kidney size/structure. CTU is not first-line. If proteinuria persists, renal function worsens, or diagnosis is unclear, nephrology evaluates renal biopsy indication.
treatment: 请肾内科会诊；卧床休息、限制盐摄入；监测血压、尿量、体重和肾功能；控制感染灶；根据水肿/高血压给予利尿、降压等支持治疗。
treatmentEn: Nephrology consult. Rest, salt restriction, monitoring of blood pressure, urine output, weight and renal function. Treat infection focus. Use diuretics/antihypertensives as needed for edema/hypertension.
mdt: 肾内科必须；儿科/儿肾科按年龄；感染科按需；风湿免疫科按需。
mdtEn: Nephrology mandatory; pediatric nephrology by age; infectious disease and rheumatology as needed.
evaluator: 未问上感咽痛、水肿、泡沫尿、血压、尿蛋白扣分；未开红细胞形态、尿蛋白定量、补体、ASO、肾功能扣分；未触发肾内科安全网为高危错误。
evaluatorEn: Deduct if sore throat/URI, edema, foamy urine, BP, proteinuria are not asked. Deduct if RBC morphology, protein quantification, complement, ASO, renal function are not ordered. High-risk error if nephrology safety net is not triggered.

title: IGA肾病
chiefComplaint: 反复血尿伴尿泡沫增多半年余，加重半月
chiefComplaintEn: Recurrent hematuria with increased foamy urine for over 6 months, worsened for half a month.
symptomsDetail: 患者半年感冒后出现血尿并尿泡沫增多，查24小时尿蛋白定量2.4g，口服“黄葵胶囊”，症状无缓解。半月前，半月前患者熬夜后再次出现上述症状，并且程度较前加重，复查24小时尿蛋白定量4.7g，肾功能正常。至我院门诊就诊，拟“蛋白尿查因”收入院。
symptomsDetailEn: For half a year, after colds, he developed hematuria and increased foamy urine. 24-hour urine protein was 2.4 g. He took Huangkui capsules without relief. Half a month ago after staying up late, symptoms recurred and worsened; repeat 24-hour urine protein was 4.7 g with normal renal function. He was admitted for evaluation of proteinuria.
admissionLabs: 尿常规+尿沉渣；尿红细胞形态；UPCR/ACR；24小时尿蛋白定量；肾功能/eGFR；电解质；白蛋白；IgA；C3/C4；ANA、抗dsDNA、ANCA、抗GBM；乙肝/丙肝/HIV筛查；必要时凝血、肾活检前评估。
admissionLabsEn: Urinalysis with sediment; RBC morphology; UPCR/ACR; 24-hour urine protein; renal function/eGFR; electrolytes; albumin; IgA; C3/C4; ANA, anti-dsDNA, ANCA, anti-GBM; HBV/HCV/HIV screening; coagulation and biopsy workup if needed.
admissionImaging: 肾脏超声评估双肾大小、皮髓质和排除结构异常；肾内科评估肾活检；一般不以CTU/膀胱镜为首选。
admissionImagingEn: Renal ultrasound for kidney size, cortex-medulla and structure. Nephrology evaluates renal biopsy. CTU/cystoscopy is not first-line.
treatment: 请肾内科会诊；监测血压、尿量、肾功能和尿蛋白；低盐饮食；避免肾毒性药物；根据蛋白尿和血压考虑RAS阻滞剂等支持治疗；评估肾活检。
treatmentEn: Nephrology consult. Monitor BP, urine output, renal function and proteinuria. Low-salt diet; avoid nephrotoxic drugs. Consider RAS blockade/supportive therapy according to proteinuria and BP. Evaluate renal biopsy.
mdt: 肾内科必须；风湿免疫科按免疫异常；病理科参与肾活检判读。
mdtEn: Nephrology mandatory; rheumatology if immune abnormalities; pathology for renal biopsy interpretation.
evaluator: 未问泡沫尿、上感诱因、尿蛋白、血压、水肿扣分；未开UPCR/24h尿蛋白/红细胞形态/免疫指标/肾活检评估扣分；未请肾内科为高危漏项。
evaluatorEn: Deduct if foamy urine, URI trigger, proteinuria, BP and edema are not asked. Deduct if UPCR/24h protein, RBC morphology, immune tests or renal biopsy evaluation are omitted. High-risk error if nephrology is not consulted.
